purpose: Make agents declare whether a task needs Bannerlord inactive before they patch, build, install, launch, or validate a live cert.

patch.reason: Patch snippets may be followed by build or install work. The snippet must establish safe runtime state unless it is documentation-only.

build.reason: Build and install lanes must start from known runtime state.

install.reason: Runtime module files must not be replaced while the game is active.

launch.reason: Launch workflows must start from a known game state.

live-cert.reason: A live cert must prove the current build from a clean runtime start, not leftover state.

blockedResultShape.blockedReason: runtime-state guardrail requires ForgeStop before this intent

agentRules: If the command assumes Bannerlord is inactive, include the preflight step in the same snippet.
Do not ask the user to remember the runtime-state preflight.
Do not rely on terminal focus for movement proof.
Do not replace compact live certs with collector rituals.
Patch only the named blockedReason or nextPatchHint after a workflow blocks.
